scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev:engine" "npm run dev:ui" "npm run dev:electron"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=packages/core && npm run build --workspace=packages/ui && npm run build --workspace=packages/electron
scripts.install:python: cd engine && pip install -r requirements.txt && playwright install chromium
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace=packages/core && npm run lint --workspace=packages/ui
